title: Tool registry and call parser
description: Implement ToolRegistry (froggy/tools.py) with 6 core tool definitions, JSON Schema export, GBNF grammar generation, system prompt injection. Implement ToolCallParser (froggy/tool_parser.py) with Hermes XML detection + bare JSON fallback, streaming-aware buffering. Implement ToolSelector (froggy/tool_selector.py) for optional tool filtering. Include tests: tests/test_tools.py, tests/test_tool_parser.py.

title: Tool executor and safety system
description: Implement ToolExecutor (froggy/tool_executor.py) with dispatch by name, path validation (block traversal, sensitive paths), command allowlist/blocklist, 3-tier safety model (auto-approve, confirm, blocked), confirmation prompts with risk classification, optional OS sandbox (sandbox-exec on macOS), result formatting with token budget truncation. Implements all 6 tools: read_file, write_file, edit_file, run_shell, web_search, python_eval. Include tests: tests/test_tool_executor.py, tests/test_tool_safety.py.
closeReason: Implemented ToolExecutor with 3-tier safety model, 6 core tools (read_file, write_file, edit_file, run_shell, web_search, python_eval), path validation, command allowlist/blocklist, confirmation prompts, macOS sandbox-exec, token-budget truncation. 104 tests across test_tool_executor.py and test_tool_safety.py.

title: Session integration, CLI commands, and README
description: Integrate tool system into ChatSession (froggy/session.py): tool loop in chat(), result injection, round limiting (max 5), streaming tool-call buffering. Add slash commands to session.py: /tools (toggle/list/add/remove), /autorun. Add custom tool loader scanning tools/ directory. Update pyproject.toml with duckduckgo_search dependency. Update README.md with tool system docs. Add environment variable config (FROGGY_TOOLS, FROGGY_PROJECT_ROOT, etc). Include tests: tests/test_tool_integration.py, tests/test_custom_tools.py.

title: Add vMLX backend for JANG models on Apple Silicon
